name: Cui Lian
page_title: Cui Lian 崔廉 [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Corrupt inspector. Demanded bribe from Liu Bei. Accosted by Zhang Fei.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	崔廉


	 Pronunciation 
	Cui1 Lian2


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Cuī Lián


	 Wade-Giles 
	Ts‘ui Lien

	 Other Names 
	Du You (督郵), Du Biao

	 Name Notes 
	Named in the Sanguozhi pinghua (Records of the Three Kingdoms), but not in Sanguo yanyi (Romance of the Three Kingdoms). Sometimes referenced as Du You [督郵] or Du Biao, but Duyou is his appointment, District Inspector, and Du Biao appears to be a mistranslation or incorrect transliteration.

In the Romance of the Three Kingdoms, he is not referenced by his actual name but his title.
sections.biography-source-undefined:
District Inspector Cui Lian arrives in Anxi county, Zhongshan district, in Ding province, where Liu Bei has been stationed following contributions in the Yellow Turban Rebellion. Cui Lian is dispatched to evaluate Liu Bei’s progress. It is implied that, in doing so, he is acting with regard to corruption of the Ten Eunuchs.

Cui Lian arrives in pompous form and, upon receiving Liu Bei, hears of his origin, and berates him a liar, threatening to punish him for his corruption. Liu Bei retires, perplexed, and asks the county office for advice. It is explained that “this can only mean he wants a bribe.” Liu Bei expresses his fruition in that he has nothing to give as he has not exploited the people for gain.

The next day, Cui Lian has brought officials before him and is forcing them to bear witness that Liu Bei has oppressed the people. Zhang Fei, having spent the day drowning his sorrow in wine, hears of this and is enraged. He barges in, seizes Cui Lian, ties him to a post, and thrashes him violently. Liu Bei and Guan Yu arrive and stop Zhang Fei, who wishes to kill Cui Lian. Guan Yu aggress, but Liu Bei spares him. Liu Bei resigns his post and the brothers depart.

In the Sanguozhi this beating is administered by Liu Bei himself. In the Sanguozhi pinghua, Zhang Fei murders the local leadership and beats the inspector to death in front of Liu Bei, then proceeds to dismember his corpse.

full_text:
Cui Lian 崔廉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Lian (崔廉). Corrupt inspector. Demanded bribe from Liu Bei. Accosted by Zhang Fei. Cui Lian is a fictional character. Cui Lian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Cui Lian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
